name: DefGuard API
description: DefGuard is an open-source identity and access management platform with WireGuard VPN integration. The API provides endpoints for managing users, devices, WireGuard networks and peers, groups, OpenID Connect clients, webhooks, YubiKey provisioning, and enterprise features like LDAP sync.
